category_sources: source_facts.description identifies ffuf as a fast web fuzzer written in Go.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ffuf; source_facts.homepage points to the official ffuf repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage/repo is the official GitHub project; README and project wiki are official documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ffuf/ffuf; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says ffuf is a fast web fuzzer written in Go.
source_facts.executables lists ffuf as a command-line executable.
